column1: #   - Telia Crowd Insights: aggregate by land_use tag from OSM
#   - RVU Sverige microdata: trip departure times by purpose -> invert to get presence
#   - SCB Tätortsdata: use as static baseline
#   [1] Swedish Working Hours Act (Arbetstidslagen) - standard 08:30-17:00 Mon-Fri
#   [2] RVU Sverige (Trafikanalys) - bimodal weekday peaks 07-09 and 16-18
#   [4] Kollektivavtal industrial shift norms - day shift 07:00-16:00
# land_use values must match OSM primary tag used in build_scored_grid()
# day_type: 'weekday' or 'weekend' (public holidays treated as weekend)
